headline: Stellantis Shifts Toward Green Mobility And Online Sales As Valuation Lags
summary: Stellantis is expanding its SUSTAINera circular economy program with a third vehicle dismantling center focused on reuse and recycling of end of life parts. The company is co sponsoring the U.S. Department of Energy's EcoCAR Innovation Challenge with General Motors, supplying Jeep Cherokee hybrid platforms to student teams. Amazon's online new car sales platform is adding Stellantis brands, including Jeep, to its growing digital auto retail offering. At Opel's R&D headquarters, Stellantis...
